description_long: This convertible car features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a prominent front grille, exposed engine components, and large, spoked wheels. The body is primarily black with white accents, and the interior appears to be open, with no visible roof covering, emphasizing its convertible nature. The front showcases a detailed engine block and chrome elements, while the rear includes two distinct seats with red detailing and a simple, squared-off trunk area. The side views reveal upward-opening doors and a long, slender antenna extending from the rear. The wheels are large and stylized, contributing to the car's retro aesthetic. Overall, the vehicle exudes a sense of luxury and nostalgia, reminiscent of early 20th-century roadsters.
description: A vintage-style black and white convertible car with exposed engine parts, large spoked wheels, and upward-opening doors. The open-top design and chrome details evoke a classic, luxurious feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed engine, prominent grille, and symmetrical headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the upward-opening door, visible engine block, and large spoked wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two red-detailed seats, squared trunk, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view with the upward-opening door, engine details, and rear antenna visible.
